rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into component or implementation scopes while preserving AADL architecture.
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes.
Use implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections.
Use visible feature names and case-provided thresholds in component type contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equation declarations.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
